data.title: Sessions never dispatch multiple exploration agents in parallel to answer questions
data.description:
## Problem

When a session needs to explore the codebase to answer a question, only a single exploration agent is dispatched. Multiple exploration agents should be used in parallel when the question spans different parts of the codebase or requires exploring multiple angles simultaneously.

## Expected Behavior

Complex exploration questions (e.g., cross-cutting codebase questions, multi-system investigations) should dispatch multiple exploration sub-agents in parallel, similar to how sprint dispatches multiple implementation sub-agents.

## Actual Behavior

Only one exploration agent is ever used, making exploration tasks slower and less thorough than they could be.

## Fix Direction

Investigate where exploration agents are dispatched (likely in debug-everything or similar skills) and add multi-agent parallel dispatch for complex exploration tasks.
